notes: Sections 1020i to 1020n, , §§ 1–6, , provided for loans to farmers by the Governor of the Farm Credit Administration for production and harvesting of crops, feed for livestock and other related purposes.act Jan. 29, 1937, ch. 750 Stat. 5
